headline: Arch Capital Group Ltd. to Report 2026 First Quarter Results on April 28
summary: PEMBROKE, Bermuda, March 17, 2026--Arch Capital Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: ACGL) ("Arch" or the "Company") today announced it expects to release its 2026 first quarter results after the close of regular stock market hours on Tuesday, April 28. The Company will hold a conference call for investors and analysts at 10 a.m. ET on Wednesday, April 29.
